(;B[gd]TR[fe][ge]SQ[hd][id][jd]LB[ef:A][ef:B]C[F16 is a key stone and should not be sacrificed, next capturing the triangle white stones and F18 are miai for black. Playing here is worth about 22 points over playing away in an empty corner. The stones marked with a triangle are dead. The stones marked with a square are stronger. White would have played at G16 if you played away. White would likely play at B next. RIGHT])
(;B[gc];W[gd]TR[ce][df][cf]SQ[fe][ge]C[This loses about 10 points. The stones marked with a triangle are weaker but this is not sufficient. The stones marked with a square are alive. ])
(;B[gf];W[gd]TR[ce][df][cf]SQ[fe][ge]C[This loses about 12 points. The stones marked with a triangle are weaker but this is not sufficient. The stones marked with a square are alive. ])
(;B[ef];W[gd]TR[ce][df][cf]SQ[fe][ge]C[This loses about 10 points. The stones marked with a triangle are weaker but this is not sufficient. The stones marked with a square are alive. ])
(;B[fc];W[dc]TR[fe][ge]SQ[hd][id][jd]C[This loses about 9 points. The stones marked with a triangle are alive. The stones marked with a square are weaker. ]))
